title: Fix semantic-release root config + protected-main compatibility
description: Release workflow migrated to reusable semantic-release failed in run 23516776377 due to default config (next=1.0.0, missing root CHANGELOG.md) and blocked push to protected main. Add root semantic-release config, preserve 0.x progression and package tag format, and stop auto runs that attempt direct main push until PR-compatible flow exists.
creator: derek.norrbom

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Triage complete: reusable semantic-release workflow executed from repo root, so python/pyproject [tool.semantic_release] was ignored. This caused defaults (next version 1.0.0, CHANGELOG.md warning) and attempted direct push to protected main (GH013). Applying fix: add root semantic-release config + keep 0.x semantics + use kanbus-py tag format + disable automatic workflow_run trigger for now.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented fix set for run 23516776377 failure: (1) added root pyproject.toml [tool.semantic_release] so reusable workflow discovers config when running at repo root; (2) switched tag_format to kanbus-py-{version} and changelog_file to python/CHANGELOG.md; (3) kept pre-1.0 behavior via allow_zero_version=true + major_on_zero=false; (4) removed duplicate semantic-release config from python/pyproject.toml to avoid drift; (5) made semantic-release workflow manual-only to avoid protected-main direct-push GH013 failures; (6) release.yml now triggers on kanbus-py-* tags in addition to v* for compatibility. Validation: parsed workflow YAML + parsed root TOML config.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Reworked approach away from root workaround: removed temporary root pyproject.toml semantic-release config, restored package-local config in python/pyproject.toml, and aligned tag_format with historical package tags (kanbus-py-{version}).

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: User approved enabling protected-main automation path. Next changes: add Anthusbot team bypass actor to main branch ruleset and switch semantic-release workflow to push_changes=true.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Applied key automation prerequisite: added Anthusbot team bypass actor to infra/github-rulesets/main-branch-protection.json using same pattern as other projects (actor_id=16575896, actor_type=Team, bypass_mode=always). Also switched semantic-release reusable call back to push_changes=true so semantic-release can push version/changelog/tag updates when run.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Manual semantic-release verification succeeded. Re-enabling automatic trigger path: workflow_run from CI on successful push to main with repo/actor guards, while keeping workflow_dispatch fallback.
